allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
test: fix test quality — delete useless tests, tighten assertions, fix isolation

- Remove ~25 trivial is-not-None/hasattr tests that provide no value
- Fix conftest.py: narrow exception types, remove unnecessary sleep, add logging
- Fix connection pool test global state leakage with autouse reset fixture
- Fix broken test_buffer_cleared_on_flush: provide mock client, add assertion
- Tighten tautological assertions \(dlq_len >= 0, escape hatches, weak checks\)
- Extract duplicated test helpers \(_call_model, _make_mock_metrics\)
- Add real assertions to semantic cache and hybrid search tests
EOF
\)")
